rationale: Reviewed technical vocabulary must not silently collapse
Current package-facing English must be clean after the reviewed wordlist
A zero-row problem table cannot stand in for a meaningful URL scan
The URL inventory must retain broad current documentation coverage
External HTTPS references must actually be presented to the checker
At least seven distinct live external targets are part of the current contract
A passing gate must execute the live checker rather than report inventory-only success
URL discovery must span package metadata README Rd and canonical vignettes
Every discovered URL must pass the current urlchecker contract
All current Rd topics must be parsed and checked
Rd syntax and encoding diagnostics are blocking
Rd content completeness diagnostics are blocking
Cross-reference validation must exercise a nontrivial current link set
Cross-references must span the documented public surface
Unresolved suspect undeclared or unavailable Rd references are blocking
Home news article index 17 articles 12 reference topics and two redirects are required
Every required pkgdown page must exist after a clean build
The clean site must contain at least the required HTML surface
The built-site link check must exercise a meaningful local graph
Broken local pages anchors or assets are blocking
Every pkgdown configuration and asset overlay must be Git-tracked and byte-exact
Unexpected configuration or build warnings are blocking
pkgdown configuration and clean build errors are blocking
Roxygen README and namespace drift is blocking
Retired named consumer coupling is forbidden on current package surfaces
Canonical vignette source-contract failures are blocking
All 17 canonical vignettes must render in fresh processes
Canonical vignette internal links must resolve
The canonical package vignette set is A1 through A9 and M1 through M8
All five protected identities must remain exact and unchanged
